suspicious_activity.narrative: Patrick Williams, DOB 1998-01-09, engaged in structuring activities from 2025-08-02 to 2025-08-04. Multiple cash deposits totaling $24,998.77 and withdrawals totaling $18,688.54 were made via ATM at branches Downtown Main, Westside Plaza, and Northgate Mall. Transactions were structured below $10,000 to evade reporting requirements, inconsistent with his occupation as a midwife and annual income of $104,667. Account IDs: CUST_0118_ACC_1 and CUST_0118_ACC_2. Activity suggests intent to avoid CTR filing. Filed under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
key_indicators: Multiple ATM deposits and withdrawals below $10,000
Frequent transactions over a short period
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Multiple cash deposits and withdrawals below $10,000 on consecutive days suggest structuring. The customer has a medium risk rating, and the transaction amounts are inconsistent with the customer's occupation and income.
